steps.title: Compare the time periods
steps.content: The first sentence reports Liberia's urbanization from 2015 to 2020. The second sentence describes urbanization across West Africa during that same five-year period, so the transition must show simultaneous trends.

steps.title: Signal simultaneous trends
steps.content: B would introduce an example, but West Africa as a whole is not an example of Liberia. C would restate the same idea, and D would suggest a later development. The transition should mean at the same time. The answer is A.
